changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Create configuration table for biorepository-approved sample types per FR-MAN-007

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Add foreign key to type_of_sample table

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Add check constraint for category values per spec

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.biorepository_approved_sample_type DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS chk_biorepo_approved_category;

changeSet.author: openelis-biorepository
changeSet.comment: Seed initial approved sample types per spec FR-MAN-007
